sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET, value DOUBLE PRECISION);
SELECT ip_address, value, cosh(value) AS hyperbolic_value FROM ip_data WHERE ip_address << inet '192.168.1.0/24' AND value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE metrics (metric_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, metric_value DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL);
SELECT a.ip_address, b.metric_value, cosh(b.metric_value) FROM ip_data AS a JOIN metrics AS b ON a.value = b.metric_value WHERE a.ip_address << inet '192.168.1.0/24' OR b.metric_value IS NULL;
SELECT ip_address, AVG(cosh(value)) AS avg_hyperbolic FROM ip_data GROUP BY ip_address HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

WITH ranked_metrics AS (SELECT metric_id, metric_value, COSH(metric_value) AS hyperbolic_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY metric_value DESC) AS rn FROM metrics) SELECT * FROM ranked_metrics WHERE hyperbolic_value IS NOT NULL AND rn <= 2;
SELECT a.ip_address, MAX(cosh(b.metric_value)) FROM ip_data AS a JOIN metrics AS b ON a.value = b.metric_value GROUP BY a.ip_address HAVING MAX(cosh(b.metric_value)) > 1.0;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_ip AS SELECT ip_address FROM ip_data WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT ip_address, value, cosh(value) FROM ip_data WHERE ip_address IN (SELECT ip_address FROM temp_ip) ORDER BY cosh(value) DESC;
